title: hydrangea serrata var. angustata
intro: Hydrangea serrata var. angustata, also known as 'Blue Stem' or 'Mountain Hydrangea', is a type of flowering shrub native to East Asia, characterized by its unique blue stems and delicate white flowers. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating various health issues, including fever, sore throat, and digestive problems. The health benefits of Hydrangea serrata var. angustata include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
